validator=source_adapter
scenario=invalid_unattended_with_unknown_rights
target=inputs/source_adapter.json
status=fail
inspected=1 accepted=0 rejected=1 deferred=0
errors=1 warnings=0
error[0]=RIGHTS_POSTURE_REQUIRES_REVIEW message=rights_posture unknown_review_required is not allowed for unattended_safe adapters
